title: pilosella × bifurca subsp. mesoschista
intro: Pilosella × bifurca subsp. mesoschista is a rare subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Pilosella × bifurca subsp. mesoschista can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
